author: mrrepac
description: Advanced sidebar audio player for songwriting: waveform, work marker, A-B loop zone, play counters and hotkeys. Playback survives note scrolling and closing the panel. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: mrrepac
manifest.description: Advanced audio player for songwriting: waveform, work marker, A-B loop zone, play counters and hotkeys — in the sidebar, or replacing the plain player inline in your notes. Playback survives note scrolling and closing the panel.
manifest.name: Songwriter Player

name: Songwriter Player

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## ✨ New

**Waveform players inside your notes.** The plain embedded audio players (`![[demo.mp3]]`) are now replaced with a compact waveform wired to the very same player as the sidebar — no more bare grey control bar. Click the wave to play from anywhere, drag to select an A-B loop, double-click to drop your work marker — all in place, right in the note.

- **One player, everywhere.** The embed you're playing shows the live playhead and its button mirrors play/pause; the others stay as a static waveform (with their saved marker and loop) until you tap them. Only one track plays at a time, and the marker, loop zone, play counts and volume all stay in sync with the sidebar.
- **Reading view and Live Preview** — both are covered.
- **Light on resources.** A file's waveform is analyzed only once its player scrolls into view, the peak cache is shared with the sidebar (one decode per file), and idle waveforms park their redraw loop — so a note full of demos stays snappy.
- **New toggle "Waveform players in notes"** (Settings → Songwriter Player, on by default). Turn it off to get the plain player back plus the "open externally" button, exactly as before. Fully localized (EN/RU).

## 🐛 Fixes

- The waveform animation loop now suspends itself when nothing is moving, instead of redrawing at 60fps while idle.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/mrrepac/obsidian-songwriter-player/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## ✨ New

**Mobile floating button.** A round play button now floats over the note on mobile. Tap it to play from your work marker (or the start) without swiping over to the sidebar player — it sits in the top-right corner and keeps the editor focused, so the on-screen keyboard stays up.

- **Two tap modes** (Settings, mobile only):
  - **Always from marker** (default) — every tap (re)starts the track from the marker.
  - **Smart play/pause** — tap plays from the marker while paused, pauses while playing.
- Enable/disable toggle. Fully localized (EN/RU).

## 🐛 Fixes

- **Track-switching race** — rapidly switching tracks could briefly show the wrong track or apply another track's marker. Loads are now guarded by a token, so a superseded load can't touch the player.
- **Waveform decode cache** — a transient decode failure no longer sticks forever; the waveform retries on the next load instead of staying blank.
- **Playhead on a paused seek** — the cursor now moves when you seek while paused (previously only the time readout updated).
- Internal cleanup: removed dead code, merged duplicate pointer branches, tidied imports.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/mrrepac/obsidian-songwriter-player/compare/1.0.2...1.1.0
